tools.name: web_search
tools.description: Search the web for current information. Returns title, URL, and snippet for each result.

outputSchema.description: Formatted search results with title, URL, and snippet per result

tools.name: web_fetch
tools.description: Fetch and extract readable content from a URL. Returns page title, description, and body text in markdown format.

url.description: Full URL to fetch including protocol (e.g., https://example.com)

outputSchema.description: Page content as markdown with title, description, and body text

tools.name: file_read
tools.description: Read a file from disk. Supports PDF, Markdown, LaTeX, plain text, and DOCX formats.

path.description: Absolute or relative path to the file

outputSchema.description: Extracted text content from the file

tools.name: browser_automation
tools.description: Control a real browser to navigate pages, fill forms, click buttons, and submit applications. Uses Playwright under the hood.

url.description: URL to navigate to (required for navigate action)

selector.description: CSS selector for the target element

tools.name: search_imported_jobs
tools.description: Search imported BigSet job postings (semantic + profile fit). Returns JSON.

tools.name: list_imported_startups
tools.description: List BigSet-imported companies with websites and fit hints.

tools.name: list_bigset_mappings
tools.description: List BigSet CSV/XLSX column mapping profiles.

tools.name: sync_bigset_folder
tools.description: Import new/changed CSV/XLSX files from BIGSET_IMPORT_DIR.

tools.name: imported_jobs_for_company
tools.description: Get imported job rows for a single company.
